title: WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Office Assistant, Cook and More Posts
organization: Women and Child Development Janjgir Champa
short_info: Women and Child Development Janjgir Champa (WCD Janjgir Champa) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 7 Various Contractual Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Law/Social Work/Sociology/Social Science/Psychology, Graduate in any subject, High School (10th) or equivalent from recognized board, 8th Pass
qualification.details: Residential Superintendent: Post Graduate in Law/Social Work/Sociology/Social Science/Psychology Office Assistant: Graduate in any subject Cook: High School (10th) or equivalent from recognized board Security Guard/Watchman: 8th Pass

salary_details.details: Residential Superintendent: Rs. 20900 Per Month Office Assistant: Rs. 16310 Per Month Cook: Rs. 6135 (Part Time Contract) Per Month Security Guard/Watchman: Rs. 11360 Per Month

selection_process: Merit List based on Academic Marks and Experience Skill Test / Walk-in Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Janjgir Champa Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://janjgir-champa.gov.in/en/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the WCD Janjgir Champa Various Contractual Posts is 02 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various contractual posts in the Women and Child Development Janjgir Champa (WCD Janjgir Champa) recruitment drive for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the WCD Janjgir Champa posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for the WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the WCD Janjgir Champa contractual posts includes the preparation of a merit list based on academic marks and experience, followed by a skill test or walk-in interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the different posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Residential Superintendent, Office Assistant, Cook, and Security Guard/Watchman. Each post has specific educational qualifications and a number of vacancies.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the highest salary offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The highest salary offered for the Residential Superintendent post is Rs. 20900 per month. Other posts have different salary scales as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Janjgir-Champa district, which is https://janjgir-champa.gov.in/en/. Please refer to the Important Links section for direct access.

faq.question: Q10. What qualifications are required for the Cook post?
faq.answer: For the Cook post, candidates must have completed High School (10th) or an equivalent examination from a recognized board. The salary for this part-time contractual role is Rs. 6135 per month.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the WCD Janjgir Champa Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the WCD Janjgir Champa Various Contractual Posts is 02 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.
